build.beforeBuildCommand: cd frontend && npx vite build --mode desktop

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:3010 https://*.douyin.com https://*.douyinvod.com https://*.douyinpic.com https://*.snssdk.com https://*.bytecdn.cn; media-src 'self' https://*.douyinvod.com https://*.douyin.com https://*.snssdk.com https://*.bytecdn.cn blob:; img-src 'self' https://*.douyin.com https://*.douyinvod.com https://*.douyinpic.com https://*.bytecdn.cn data: https:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https:
